questionText: Provide details on the electricity, heat, steam, and cooling your organization has generated and consumed in the reporting year.
questionKo: 귀사가 보고연도에 생산하고 소비한 전기, 열, 스팀 및 냉방에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Many organizations generate their own electricity, steam, heat, and/or cooling. Bringing the generation of these secondary energy carriers inside the organizational boundary has the effect of reducing an organization's Scope 2 emissions while increasing Scope 1 emissions. Because the scale of self-generation can be highly variable, this can create additional uncertainty for data users when comparing Scope 1 and 2 emissions across company samples or portfolios. CDP aims to alleviate this distorting factor by bringing transparency on the extent of self-generation by organizations.

columns.text: Generation that is consumed by the organization (MWh)
Generation from renewable sources that is consumed by the organization (MWh)
columns.textKo: 에서 재생에너지 배출원 해당 소비한 별 조직 (MWh)

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Generation of electricity, heat, steam, or cooling" in response to 7.30.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Guidance on unit conversion is available in the following Technical Note: " Conversion of fuel data to MWh ".
Nuclear power generation is not to be included for this question, as nuclear power is covered in more detail in questions for energy utilities & power generators.
You should only account for heat generated in transferable mediums, i.e. the forms of heat that may also be purchased or acquired from third parties (as listed in question 7.30.1).
This is because the proportion of fuel combustion heat made available for use in applications after losses (e.g. direct heating for industrial process plant and equipment) may be difficult to measure or would require detailed process monitoring equipment readings.
Total Gross generation (MWh) (column 2) 
Gross generation should be reported, where ‘Gross' covers the total output from all generating installations or facilities without deducting for electricity, steam, heat or cooling used by the generating plant or facility for the purpose of generation. This includes both the energy you produced and did not consume, as well as the amount you did consume.
Generation that is consumed by the organization (MWh) (column 3) 
This column is a subset of column 2; the amount entered cannot be higher than the amount entered in column 2. If the entered amount is equal to the amount in column 2, then your organization consumed (or wasted) all of the electricity, steam, heat, or cooling that your organization generated.
Generation from renewable sources that is consumed by the organization (MWh) (column 5) 
This column is a subset of column 4; the amount entered cannot be higher than the amount entered in column 4. If the entered amount is equal to the amount in column 4, then your organization consumed all of the electricity, steam, heat, or cooling that your organization generated from renewable sources. 
Sources of self-generated renewable electricity might be on-site or off-site, on the grid, or entirely off-grid. Organizations must retain energy attributes to claim use of renewable electricity, potentially in the form of energy attribute certificates (EACs). If EACs are issued, organizations must retain them to claim the use of renewable electricity.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Gross generation: covers the total output from all generating installations or facilities without deducting for amount of generated electricity, steam, heat or cooling used by those installations or facilities for the purpose of generation. Deducting this self-consumption of output gives the net generation. To avoid double-counting, consumption of one energy carrier (i.e., electricity, heat, steam, or cooling) to produce another (i.e., electricity, heat, steam, or cooling) within the same installation should not be included. For example, the generation of steam which is consumed in a steam turbine for the generation of electricity should not be included.
Renewable energy sources: energy taken from sources that are inexhaustible, e.g. wind, water, solar, geothermal energy and sustainable biofuels (adapted from the GHG protocol, 2004 ).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
At least one row completed - 4 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.

criteria.criteriaKo: 공시 점수는 해당 문항에서 요구하는 필수 셀, 행 또는 설명 입력을 완료한 정도에 따라 부여됩니다. 비공개 경로, 미응답 셀, 필수 선택지 누락 여부에 따라 점수가 제한될 수 있으므로 위 응답방법과 D/A/M/L 배점표를 함께 확인하십시오.

change.question_ko: 귀사가 보고연도에 생산하고 소비한 전기, 열, 스팀 및 냉방에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
change.q2025_text: Provide details on the electricity, heat, steam, and cooling your organization has generated and consumed in the reporting year.
change.change_summary: Question not to appear to financial services organizations unless they are RE100 members.
change.scoring_change_summary: CC Financial services Disclosure, Awareness, Management & Leadership • All levels are not scored. Previously this question had not been shown to Financial services organizations.

change.question_en: Provide details on the electricity, heat, steam, and cooling your organization has generated and consumed in the reporting year.

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 시멘트,, &, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사가 보고연도에 생산하고 소비한 전기, 열, 스팀 및 냉방에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오. `'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
listTitleEn: Provide details on the electricity, heat, steam, and cooling your organization has generated and consumed in the reporting year.
listTitleKo: 귀사가 보고연도에 생산하고 소비한 전기, 열, 스팀 및 냉방에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
